zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburg於1367年出生在德國布勞恩史維藍德可萊斯 沃爾分比特爾沃爾分比特爾時，她的父親Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburg43歲，母親Katharina von Anhalt-Bernburg35歲。她於1395年與Gerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburg在德國尼德薩辛布勞恩史維布勞恩史維結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1423年4月3日在德國布勞恩史維藍德可萊斯 沃爾分比特爾享年56歲，埋葬在德國海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburg于1367年出生在德国布勞恩史維藍德可萊斯 沃爾分比特爾沃爾分比特爾时，她的父亲Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburg43岁，母亲Katharina von Anhalt-Bernburg35岁。她于1395年与Gerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburg在德国尼德薩辛布勞恩史維布勞恩史維结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1423年4月3日在德国布勞恩史維藍德可萊斯 沃爾分比特爾享年56岁，埋葬在德国海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福。

nameMeanings.name: Katherina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburg was born in 1367, in Wolfenbüttel, Wolfenbüttel, Brunswick, Germany, her father, Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, was 43 and her mother, Katharina von Anhalt-Bernburg, was 35. She married Gerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburg in 1395, in Braunschweig, Brunswick, Lower Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 3 April 1423, in Wolfenbüttel, Brunswick, Germany, at the age of 56, and was buried in Hanover, Prussia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburg est née en 1367, à Wolfenbüttel, Landkreis Wolfenbüttel, Braunschweig, Allemagne, son père, Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Katharina von Anhalt-Bernburg, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Gerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburg en 1395, à Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 avril 1423, à Landkreis Wolfenbüttel, Braunschweig, Allemagne, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Hanovre, Prusse, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburg 1367 in Wolfenbüttel, Landkreis Wolfenbüttel, Braunschweig, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburg 43 und ihre Mutter Katharina von Anhalt-Bernburg 35. Sie hat 1395 in Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Deutschland Gerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. April 1423 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Landkreis Wolfenbüttel, Braunschweig, Deutschland und wurde in Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburg è nata il nel 1367 nel Wolfenbüttel, Landkreis Wolfenbüttel, Braunschweig, Germania, sua padre, Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Katharina von Anhalt-Bernburg, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Gerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburg nel 1395, nel Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 3 aprile 1423, nel Landkreis Wolfenbüttel, Braunschweig, Germania, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburgが1367年にドイツブラウンスチウエイグランドクレイス ウオルフエンブuッテルウオルフエンブuッテルで生まれた時，父Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburgは43歳，母Katharina von Anhalt-Bernburgは35歳であった。1395年にドイツニーダーサチセンブラウンスチウエイグブラウンスチウエイグでGerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1423年4月3日にドイツブラウンスチウエイグランドクレイス ウオルフエンブuッテルで56歳で死去し，ドイツプレウssンプロヴィンズ ハノバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburg(이)가 1367년 독일 브라슈위그 랜드크레이스 울펜브u텔 울펜브u텔에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburg(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katharina von Anhalt-Bernburg(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1395년 독일 니더작센 브라슈위그 브라슈위그에서 Gerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1423년 4월 3일 독일 브라슈위그 랜드크레이스 울펜브u텔에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 해노버에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburg nasceu em 1367, em Wolfenbüttel, Landkreis Wolfenbüttel, Braunschweig, Alemanha, seu pai, Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Katharina von Anhalt-Bernburg, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Gerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburg em 1395, em Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de abril de 1423, em Landkreis Wolfenbüttel, Braunschweig, Alemanha, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburg родилась в 1367 г. в местности волфенбuттел, ландкрис волфенбuттел, браунщвиг, Германия, её отцу по имени Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburg было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Katharina von Anhalt-Bernburg, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburg в 1395 г. в местности браунщвиг, браунщвиг, ниедирсачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 3 апреля 1423 г. в местности ландкрис волфенбuттел, браунщвиг, Германия в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности провинз ханновир, Пруссия, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburg nació en 1367, en Wolfenbüttel, Landkreis Wolfenbüttel, Braunschweig, Alemania, su papá, Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Katharina von Anhalt-Bernburg, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Gerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburg en 1395, en Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 3 de abril de 1423, en Landkreis Wolfenbüttel, Braunschweig, Alemania, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Alemania.
